intro: Tirucalia gummifera, also known as Pterocarpus marsupium, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia, its bark being the primary source of medicinal properties. The health benefits of Tirucalia gummifera include its ability to help manage diabetes, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various cardiovascular and metabolic disorders.
